request.prompt: a delete confirmation whose trigger button shows a badge and a secondary smaller button inside it

children.text: Are you sure you want to delete your account?
This is a permanent action. All associated data will be lost and cannot be recovered.

components.title: Are you sure you want to delete your account?
components.description: This is a permanent action. All associated data will be lost and cannot be recovered.

warnings.message: $.root.children[0]: compound 'alert-dialog' subtree flattened onto emitted props (documented casualty; nested props beyond text are not carried).
$.root.children[0]: A2UI requires a declarative action on AlertDialog; synthesized event 'confirm_deletion'.
